headline: BidBoardX expands carrier access to committed freight, bringing ease and efficiency to a fragmented marketplace
summary: EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn., June 17, 2026--BidBoardX expands carrier access to committed freight, bringing ease and efficiency to a fragmented marketplace
